title: Cherry-pick PR #724: Kill engine child processes on app exit (fixes #723)
description:
## Summary

- Add `Drop` impl to `BaseEngine` calling `child.start_kill()` so engine processes are killed when dropped
- Add `kill_sync()` methods to `BaseEngine` and `EngineProcess` for non-async kill from `drop()` and shutdown handlers
- Add `RunEvent::ExitRequested` handler in `main.rs` that iterates `AppState::engine_processes` and kills each one

Fixes #723.

## Root cause

`BaseEngine` holds a `tokio::process::Child` but has no `Drop` impl. When the app exits, the child is dropped without

in_scope: Port upstream PR #724 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #724 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #724 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #724 fix in running app

iteration_log.result: All code from PR #724 present in our fork
iteration_log.notes: kill_sync, Drop for BaseEngine, ExitRequested handler all present
